name: 地图技能
subject: humanities
curriculum_points: Demonstrate proficiency in using and creating maps, including the interpretation of topographic maps, thematic maps, and GIS data (AO1).
Apply geographic skills such as calculating scale, gradient, and area, and interpreting spatial patterns from maps to solve geographic problems (AO2).

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 人文思维导图/时间轴：概念关系可视化
